description: Medevac Billing & Collections — specialized medical transport billing for Medicare, Medicaid, private insurance with No Surprises Act compliance, CMS claim submission, prior authorization tracking, and denial management. HIPAA strictly enforced.

hard_stops.label: HIPAA Violation Risk
hard_stops.logic: Protected Health Information (PHI) detected in billing communication channel that is not HIPAA-compliant — block output until secure channel confirmed

hard_stops.label: Balance Billing Prohibited
hard_stops.logic: No Surprises Act prohibits balance billing for this transport — patient cannot be billed beyond in-network cost-sharing amount

hard_stops.label: Medicare Claim Missing Medical Necessity
hard_stops.logic: Medicare claim submitted without required medical necessity documentation — claim will be denied and may trigger audit

hard_stops.label: Upcoding Detected
hard_stops.logic: Billing code does not match the documented level of service — potential False Claims Act violation

soft_flags.label: Prior Authorization Expiring
soft_flags.logic: Prior authorization for transport is approaching expiration — renewal or new authorization needed

soft_flags.label: Claim Denied — Appeal Window Open
soft_flags.logic: Insurance claim denied but appeal window is still open — initiate denial management workflow

soft_flags.label: High Patient Responsibility Estimate
soft_flags.logic: Estimated patient out-of-pocket responsibility is significant — No Surprises Act good-faith estimate required

soft_flags.label: State Balance Billing Law Check Needed
soft_flags.logic: Transport crosses state lines or destination state has specific balance billing protections beyond federal law — verify state-specific compliance
